focus_points.label: Ownership boundaries and what “good” means here.
focus_points.reason: Whether he feels clear on ownership boundaries and expectations for his level, especially around what he should drive vs what he should escalate or coordinate.

focus_points.label: Where to ask for context before assumptions.
focus_points.reason: Whether he knows the right places to get team-specific context so he doesn’t build an internal map that differs from how the team actually operates.

focus_points.label: Incident expectations and escalation norms.
focus_points.reason: Whether he understands incident expectations and who he should loop in early, so he can act correctly under pressure rather than relying on docs.

focus_points.label: Concrete onboarding support you can add now.
focus_points.reason: What he would want more of from you during onboarding—fast feedback loops, clearer decision context, and explicit introductions—so missing context gets filled early instead of later.
